title: Hedyotis fraterna
intro: Hedyotis fraterna, also known as Chinese fraterna, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to Southeast Asia and used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which have been attributed to its potential in treating various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Bioactive constituents of Hedyotis fraterna include iridoid glycosides, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal effects. In traditional Chinese medicine, Hedyotis fraterna is commonly used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tonics to promote health and well-being.
